---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/sourangshupal
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/sourangshupal
---

I'm Sourangshu Pal — an engineer and researcher working at the intersection of AI systems, machine learning, and software engineering.

This blog is where I write about building production AI systems: retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, LLM application architecture, vector search infrastructure, and the practical details that textbooks skip over.

I focus on what actually works in production — not toy examples, but real systems with real failure modes.

**Topics I write about:**

- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and semantic search
- LLM application design and prompt engineering
- Vector databases and ANN algorithms
- ML system evaluation and observability
- Python, async patterns, and API design

---

*If you find something useful here, reach out on [GitHub](https://github.com/sourangshupal) or [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/sourangshupal).*
